heading: Acceptance of donations of lands and funds; acquisition of land
label: 450m Acceptance of donations of lands and funds; acquisition of land
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to accept donations of land, interests in land and/or buildings, structures, and other property within the boundaries of said national monument as determined and fixed hereunder, and donations of funds for the purchase and/or maintenance thereof, the title and evidence of title to lands acquired to be satisfactory to the Secretary of the Interior: , That he may acquire on behalf of the United States out of any donated funds, by purchase at prices deemed by him reasonable, or by condemnation under the provisions of , such tracts of land within the said national monument as may be necessary for the completion thereof.Providedsection 3113 of title 40
notes: References in TextHereunder, referred to in text, means act , which is classified to sections 450 to 450n of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Aug. 21, 1935l
